message:
fix(count): handle empty labels array as "(no labels)" in group counts

When an issue had an entry in the labels map but the vec was empty,
the loop body executed zero iterations, silently dropping the issue
from all buckets. Now an explicit is_empty check routes these issues
into the "(no labels)" bucket, matching the fallback for issues with
no labels-map entry at all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
